question: What are the two primary ingredients in Alchemical 'Transformation-Elixirs'?

answers.original:
The two primary ingredients in Alchemical Transformation-Elixirs are Essence-Pearls and Metamorphic-Acid.

### References

- [1] Alchemical Transformation-Elixirs
- [2] Essence-Pearls
- [3] Metamorphic-Acid
answers.perturbed:
The two primary ingredients in Alchemical Transformation-Elixirs are Essence-Pearls and Deep-Sea Creatures.

### References

- [1] Alchemical Transformation-Elixirs
- [2] Essence-Pearls
- [3] Deep-Sea Creatures

entities.name: Alchemical Transformation-Elixirs
entities.description: Alchemical Transformation-Elixirs are magical potions that can temporarily change living beings and last for exactly one hour.

entities.name: Essence-Pearls
entities.description: Essence-Pearls contain concentrated life force and are used in the creation of Transformation-Elixirs.

entities.name: Metamorphic-Acid
entities.description: Metamorphic-Acid is a substance used to dissolve Essence-Pearls and rebuild matter.

relations.description: Essence-Pearls are a key component in the creation of Transformation-Elixirs.
Metamorphic-Acid is used to dissolve Essence-Pearls to create Transformation-Elixirs.
Essence-Pearls are harvested from deep-sea creatures.
